description.value:
Send Medication data MGB building blocks for patient G. XXX_Hemsbergen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_medicatiegegevens_sturen_MGB
Original description: TEST Medicatiegegevens MGB Scenarioset 6
Send Medication data MGB resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationStatement).where(category.coding.code = '422979000').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '48291')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '102164')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationStatement).where(category.coding.code = '422979000').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '68519')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '117080')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationStatement).where(category.coding.code = '422979000').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '67903')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2194')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationStatement).where(category.coding.code = '422979000').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '226866')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '195758')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationStatement).where(category.coding.code = '422979000').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '72664')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '119903')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationStatement).where(category.coding.code = '422979000').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1090')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3816')))).where(extension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-AsAgreedIndicator').exists().not()).count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationStatement).where(category.coding.code = '422979000').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3956')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '12548')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationStatement).where(category.coding.code = '422979000').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1013602')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '228427')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '196738')))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '3956|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (ACETYLSALICYLZUUR TABLET 100MG)

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is Medication).where(code.coding.exists(system = 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' and code = '3956')).count() = 1
